scenarios.name: Order confirmation router with retry logic
scenarios.rationale: Treatment implements the documented ChannelAdapter interface, the three-tier email retry schedule (1min/5min/30min), a dead letter queue, List-Unsubscribe headers, and in-app DB+WebSocket delivery, while the baseline uses a generic BullMQ retry without per-channel windows, DLQ, or unsubscribe handling.

scenarios.name: Per-user preferences with security overrides
scenarios.rationale: Treatment matches the documented schema with composite unique (user_id, notification_type, channel), encodes the Security/Transactional/Activity/Social/Marketing category matrix with non-disableable enforcement, and exposes REST CRUD, while the baseline uses a flat per-user toggle table with no per-type granularity or security override.
